context.label: Y Combinator
context.description: The world's most prominent startup accelerator. Provides seed funding ($500K standard deal), an intensive 3-month program, and access to a global alumni network of founders and investors. Primary delivery mechanism for Seed Funding & Investment capability at the pre-seed and seed stage.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. YC is globally recognized as a primary seed-funding provider. Not yet validated against specific Philos mission outcomes. Example provider — no affiliation, participation, availability, or selection implied.

context.label: Antler
context.description: Global early-stage VC and startup generator that invests from day zero. Runs programs across 30+ cities, co-founding companies with entrepreneurs and providing pre-seed capital, operational support, and a global investor network.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Antler operates a structured day-zero investment program relevant to early-stage capital gaps. Not yet validated against specific Philos mission outcomes. Example provider — no affiliation, participation, availability, or selection implied.

context.label: Flexport
context.description: A technology-driven freight forwarder and supply chain management platform. Provides end-to-end logistics — ocean, air, and customs — with real-time visibility, analytics, and supplier coordination. Primary delivery mechanism for Supply Chain Sourcing capability.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Flexport is a recognized platform for supply chain execution at scale. Not yet validated against specific Philos mission outcomes. Example provider — no affiliation, participation, availability, or selection implied.

context.label: Beehiiv
context.description: A newsletter and community platform built for growth. Provides audience acquisition tools, monetization infrastructure (subscriptions, boosts, ad network), and analytics. Enables missions to build, retain, and monetize an engaged community around their work.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Beehiiv is a recognized growth platform for community-oriented missions. Not yet validated against specific Philos mission outcomes. Example provider — no affiliation, participation, availability, or selection implied.

context.label: Pentagram
context.description: The world's largest independent design consultancy, structured as a partnership of 24 principals. Provides brand strategy, visual identity systems, and creative direction across all media. Delivery mechanism for Brand & Creative Direction capability at the highest level of craft.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Pentagram is a globally recognized provider of brand and creative direction. Not yet validated against specific Philos mission outcomes. Example provider — no affiliation, participation, availability, or selection implied.

context.label: Psychology Today
context.description: Therapist directory with 180,000+ verified mental health professionals including licensed couples therapists.

context.label: Open Path Collective
context.description: Nonprofit network of therapists offering sessions at $30–$80 for individuals and couples with financial need.

context.label: Fastweb
context.description: Scholarship matching platform with 1.5M+ scholarships; matches students based on academic profile and circumstances.

context.label: Going Merry
context.description: Scholarship discovery and application platform with essay tools and counselor support for high school and college students.

context.label: SCORE
context.description: Nationwide nonprofit with 10,000+ volunteer mentors providing free guidance on business credit, funding, and planning.

context.label: U.S. Small Business Administration
context.description: Federal agency providing loan programs (7(a), 504), grants, and technical assistance to small businesses.

context.label: Mobileye
context.description: Road safety analytics using camera and sensor data from vehicles to map high-risk locations and accident patterns for municipalities.

context.label: NACTO
